chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.1975 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judges Hg. Of Bail Application. 1. For orders on M.A. No.11366 of 2024 2. For orders on M.A. No.11368 of 2024 3. For hearing of Bail Application. 02.09.2024 Mr. Imdad Ali Malik, Advocate along with Applicant. ---------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Learned counsel for the applicant states that applicant has been booked in crime No.314 of 2024 u/s. 302 PPC registered at PS Shaheed Mir Murtaza District Khairpur and he is expecting his imminent arrest at the hands of police. Applicant, however, wishes to surrender himself before the concerned trial Court so that he may seek pre-arrest bail. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, protective bail for a period of Seven days from today is granted to applicant/accused Muhammad Yasin subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the concerned trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of Seven days from today or when the applicant/accused surrenders before the concerned trial Court which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case applicant/accused failed to surrender before the learned trial Court within the aforesaid period, his bail bonds shall stand forfeited. Application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE MAK/PS
